overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a foggy, neon-lit Night City street at night. The scene features massive elevated highway overpasses, holographic advertisements, and transitions from wide streets to narrow sidewalks with vibrant red and multicolored signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner under elevated highway with digital billboards

events.description: begins walking forward from street corner under the overpass
passes behind large billboard structure temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street under the massive overpass structure

entered.detail: massive elevated highway structure dominating the upper portion of the scene
large illuminated advertisement showing two figures with the text FERVID
large electrical utility boxes on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy Night City street corner beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. Digital billboards including one for FERVID illuminate the scene with green and white light. The camera follows the character walking forward along the asphalt street, passing utility boxes and traffic lights while the overpass structure looms overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide intersection under overpass with traffic signals

events.description: approaches red traffic light at intersection
turns slightly left while navigating the intersection area

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide street under the overpass, approaching the sidewalk on the far side

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing near the corner in the fog

entered.detail: yellow and black striped construction barriers along the sidewalk edge
various glowing advertisements visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a wide intersection beneath the overpass, the sky partially visible through the fog above. Street barriers line the left side while distant neon signs glow through the haze. The traffic light remains red as the character crosses the asphalt crosswalk, with a lone pedestrian visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk with vending machines and storefronts

events.description: moves from open street to narrow sidewalk with vending machines
follows pedestrian in reflective jacket walking ahead

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a reflective silver jacket along the narrow sidewalk under awnings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing silver reflective jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: yellow and blue vending machine with BIG KAPPA branding
traditional red paper lanterns hanging above the walkway
red trash receptacle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow enclosed sidewalk sheltered by building awnings. A vending machine with BIG KAPPA branding stands on the left while red paper lanterns hang overhead. The character follows a pedestrian wearing a distinctive silver reflective jacket, passing trash cans and metal railings along the concrete path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with intense red neon signage and 24-hour shop

events.description: lighting shifts to dominant red neon from 24h shop signs
fog density increases significantly reducing visibility

agents.ego_description: walking through the intensely red-lit narrow passage between buildings

entered.detail: bright red neon sign with 24 and Japanese characters indicating 24-hour shop
cluster of traditional red lanterns hanging outside the shop

segments.scene_description: The narrow sidewalk becomes bathed in intense red neon light from a 24-hour shop on the left. Red paper lanterns cluster outside the storefront, casting a crimson glow on the foggy atmosphere. Visibility decreases as fog thickens, obscuring the street ahead while metal railings line the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy street under overpass with passing traffic

events.description: futuristic black sedan drives past on the right side of the street
exits narrow alley back to wider street area under overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing along the foggy street as a futuristic vehicle passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving past on the street with headlights on

entered.detail: futuristic black car with illuminated headlights driving along the street
tall buildings with illuminated windows visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow alley back onto a wider foggy street beneath the overpass. A futuristic black sedan drives past on the right, its headlights cutting through the thick fog. Street lamps cast pools of greenish light on the wet asphalt while distant building lights twinkle through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with CIRKUS sign and various storefronts

events.description: enters more densely commercial area with overhead CIRKUS signage
turns slightly right while passing various shop fronts

agents.ego_description: walking past various shops and neon signs including a prominent blue CIRKUS sign overhead

notable_agents.action: person in yellow outfit walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large blue overhead sign with CIRKUS COLD text spanning the street
green neon OPEN sign on shop door
multiple colorful storefront signs and awnings along the building facade

segments.scene_description: The street becomes more commercial with a prominent blue CIRKUS COLD sign spanning overhead. Various shop fronts line the left side including one with a green OPEN sign. The character passes a pedestrian in yellow clothing while red lanterns and colorful neon signs illuminate the foggy street. The atmosphere shifts to a more vibrant commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with holographic advertisements and rainbow-colored building

events.description: crosses street at intersection alongside other pedestrians
approaches corner with large colorful digital displays and rainbow building

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the busy intersection surrounded by bright holographic advertisements and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing crossing the street alongside the character

entered.detail: tall building with rainbow-colored illuminated panels shifting through purple, blue, green, yellow, and red
large floating digital advertisements with bright animated graphics
building corner covered in colorful murals and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide busy intersection dominated by a spectacular rainbow-colored building on the right with shifting colored panels. Large holographic billboards float above the street while the character crosses the asphalt crosswalk with other pedestrians. The corner building features vibrant murals and digital displays, creating a dense cyberpunk urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy urban corridor that evolves from a desolate industrial underpass into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway where green and white digital billboards illuminate a wide, hazy intersection as the character walks across the asphalt. The scene then shifts into a narrow, enclosed sidewalk sheltered by awnings and red paper lanterns, passing a Big Kappa vending machine before the atmosphere becomes bathed in an intense crimson glow from a 24-hour shop. As the camera emerges from the alley back onto the wider street, a black sedan cuts through the thickening fog, leading the character past greenish street lamps and a blue Cirkus Cold sign toward a more colorful commercial area. Finally, the environment opens into a bustling intersection dominated by a rainbow-colored building with shifting panels and floating holographic billboards, completing the transition into a dense, high-tech urban center.
